title: Active Sessions
description: These are the devices where you're currently signed in. Check this list regularly and sign out from devices you don't recognize or no longer use.

sign_out_all.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out from all other devices? This will immediately sign you out from all other devices and may disconnect connected apps on those devices.

action.confirm_sign_out: Are you sure you want to sign out from this device? This will immediately sign you out and may disconnect connected apps.

empty_state.title: No Other Devices
empty_state.description: You're not signed in on any other devices.
